title: ZOPPER 12 x Mini Plastic Containers with Lids (35ml) – BPA-Free Airtight Food Storage Pots for Meal Prep, Sauce, Snacks, Dressing & Fridge Organisation – Screw Top Lunch Box Containers
features: SUPER-COMPACT 35ML SIZE – Perfect for dips, dressings, sauces, herbs, snacks and baby food; ideal for portion control and calorie-counting.
FOUR-SIDED CLIP-LOCK LIDS – Creates an airtight, leak-proof seal to keep contents fresh and prevent drips in lunch bags and backpacks.
PREMIUM BPA-FREE PLASTIC – Made from food-grade materials that are freezer, microwave and dishwasher safe for ultimate convenience.
COLOUR-CODED LIDS – Includes 6 purple and 6 green lids for easy meal planning, batch prep and quick fridge or freezer organisation.
REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY – Durable build for everyday use; reduces reliance on single-use plastics and helps save money over time.
description: Product Description Airtight Freshness for Snacks & Sauces Keep food fresher for longer with our leakproof, airtight lids—ideal for storing snacks, dips, sauces, or baby food on the go. Perfect for Meal Prep & Portion Control Plan ahead with ease! These mini containers are ideal for meal prepping small portions, dressings, or healthy snacks. Multiple Sizes & Pack Options Available Choose the quantity and style that suits your needs—clip-lock, screw-top, or classic push lids in vibrant green & purple. Compact Design for Fridge & Lunch Bags Small, stackable, and space-saving—perfect for organised fridge storage or popping into lunchboxes and cool bags. BPA-Free & Food-Safe Plastic Made from durable, BPA-free plastic that’s safe for everyday food storage and trusted by health-conscious households. Easy to Open, Easy to Seal Child-friendly yet secure—designed with practical lids that are simple to use while preventing spills and leaks. Ideal for Baby Food Portions Perfect for storing purees, mashed fruits, or small baby portions—great for weaning and portion planning.
